revenue_growth.detail: Revenue growth 21.7% — in 15-30% band; OCI-driven acceleration but total-company figure.

earnings_accel.detail: Earnings growth 24.5% > revenue growth 21.7% — modest operating leverage.

earnings_accel.detail: Earnings growth 95.6% > revenue growth 73.2% — meaningful operating leverage.

short_dynamics.detail: Short interest 1.21% (<5%) but rising 13.1% MoM — fails 'declining AND <5%' pass criterion.

Analyst mean target $268.61 implies 32.6% upside; median $265

growth_picks.analyst_take: A near-perfect growth-quality profile at a surprisingly reasonable 18x forward with PEG under 1 — the drawdown-to-52w-high of only 4.6% is the main entry concern. BUY bias stands given backlog visibility and 32% consensus upside, but scaling in on pullbacks to the $185 SMA20 is preferable to chasing.
